title: Where in Bentonville is Carmen Sandiego?
subtitle: Bentonville Division
intro: The master thief Carmen Sandiego has scattered clues across Bentonville landmarks, trails, museums, and public spaces. Use your deductive wits, decode ciphers, and issue the correct arrest warrant before she slips away!
successMessage: You arrested Carmen Sandiego in Bentonville and recovered every stolen clue.

rounds.ariaLabel: Encrypted farewell note showing FDUPHQ for a Caesar cipher challenge.
rounds.description: Crack Carmen's signature encrypted farewell note using Caesar cipher (shift left by 3).
rounds.visualHtml:
ENCRYPTED NOTE

FDUPHQ
rounds.question: What does "FDUPHQ" decode to?

rounds.ariaLabel: ACME intelligence list used to deduce Carmen getaway vehicle.
rounds.description: Use process of elimination to deduce Carmen's getaway route through Bentonville.
rounds.visualHtml:
ACME Intelligence Details

* The suspect wears a red hat.

* The suspect is not at the Downtown Square.

* The suspect does not drive a delivery truck.

* Hired a trail guide near Osage Park.
rounds.question: Which getaway vehicle matches the profile?

rounds.ariaLabel: Compass grid starting at wetland row 3 column 3 and moving north 2 west 1.
rounds.description: Solve the final compass tracking course through the Osage Park wetlands.

briefing.headline: SQUARE MARKET SWAP!

briefing.callingCard: A red card reads: "I left the hard part local. Ask The Fletching why Dog park mattered."

suspect.name: Ozzie Quill
suspect.role: Lookout hiding evidence among wetland programs
suspect.dossierNote: Uses archery scorecards for cipher keys and knows which boardwalk turns are quiet after sunset.

briefing.nextLead: The last scorecard has Carmen's red mark and three final coordinates for the closing chase.

clues: The permit says Park & Play and is clipped to a leash hook.
The suspect was steps from the pavilion parking lot.
A volunteer vest has wetland mud on one side and paw prints on the other.

puzzle.title: Park Permit Trail
puzzle.description: Use the Bentonville clues to identify the correct Osage Park hideout.
puzzle.question: Which Osage Park feature matches the paw-print clues?
puzzle.visualHtml:

Osage Park

Dog park

osage-park.funFact: Osage Park combines wetland access, recreation areas, pickleball, dog park space, archery, and public art.
osage-park.learningObjective: Identify a real Bentonville landmark or district feature from connected clues about Osage Park.
osage-park.accessibilityDescription: Osage Park evidence card for Dog park.
